cit.note: 12.5% on trading income; 25% on non-trading/passive income; 15% Pillar Two for MNEs with consolidated revenue >= EUR 750M

income_tax_2025.note: USC (Universal Social Charge) additional; PRSI Class A1 employer 11.15%

prsi.note: PRSI Class A1; employer 11.15% from 1 Oct 2024; employee 4%
